ctaSub: Start with a free POS today. Build your sales history and unlock access to working capital for your business.

faqItems.q: How does the financing / working capital work?
faqItems.a: Sign up for Desktop Kitchen, run your POS on the Pro plan for 4-6 months, and process card payments. Your daily transaction history builds a financing profile. Once eligible, you can get pre-approved for working capital based on your actual sales volume — no banks, no collateral, no lengthy applications.

faqItems.q: Do I need to accept card payments to qualify?
faqItems.a: Yes. Card transaction history is the foundation of how we evaluate financing eligibility. The more consistent your card payment volume, the stronger your profile. Cash-only businesses aren't eligible for working capital.

faqItems.q: How much working capital can I get?
faqItems.a: The amount is based on your monthly card sales volume. The more consistent and higher your transaction volume, the more you may qualify for. Specific amounts are determined during the pre-approval process.

faqItems.q: Are there interest rates or fees on the financing?
faqItems.a: Working capital terms are transparent and disclosed upfront during the pre-approval process. There are no hidden fees. Full terms including any costs are presented before you accept any offer.

faqItems.q: What is a restaurant POS system?
faqItems.a: A restaurant POS (point of sale) system is software that manages orders, payments, inventory, and sales reports from a single platform. Desktop Kitchen is a modern POS designed specifically for quick-service restaurants, ghost kitchens, and delivery-first operators — with a built-in path to working capital.

faqItems.q: Does Desktop Kitchen integrate with Uber Eats, Rappi, and DiDi Food?
faqItems.a: Yes. Desktop Kitchen pulls orders from Uber Eats, Rappi, and DiDi Food into a single screen. You can see per-platform commissions, set markup rules, and get real-time delivery P&L reports.
No. Desktop Kitchen runs in any web browser — tablet, laptop, PC, or phone. No special hardware or dedicated POS terminals required.

faqItems.q: How much does Desktop Kitchen cost?
faqItems.a: Desktop Kitchen has a Free for Life plan with up to 50 daily transactions. The Pro plan is $20 USD/month (~$350 MXN) and unlocks unlimited everything — plus eligibility for working capital after 4-6 months of card payment history.

faqItems.q: Can I run multiple virtual brands from one kitchen?
faqItems.a: Yes. The Pro plan supports unlimited virtual brands — all from a single kitchen, with separate menus, markup rules, and P&L tracking per brand.
